headline: How The Oshkosh (OSK) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Reset Price Targets
summary: Oshkosh’s fair value target has been revised from US$172.67 to US$164.79, pointing to a modest reset in what analysts see as a reasonable price for the stock. That move comes as several firms reduce earlier, more optimistic targets, reflecting how they are weighing construction and rental equipment opportunities against execution risks and the timing of large projects. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets can help you track and interpret the evolving analyst narrative...
